posts.author: LaurentConroux (Laurent Conroux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

A lot of work has been done to update European accounts with all the features monday.com can provide.

We have more and more customers who would now like to move their existing account to an European server.

We tried it once, but we are too limited in what we can do to try again for our other customers.
Could you set up a service to do it for us?

We perfectly understand this could be a one-shot par account paying service.
As long as it exists we will be able to offer it and our customers will have a choice they do not have today.

Best regards,
Laurent, web dev @ Synolia, platinum partner
